---
title: "Course Goals Letter (Mid)"
subtitle: "Week 7"
author: "[STUDENT NAME]"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---

# Select Your Target Grade Competency

> **Instructions:** Review the grading tier tables below. The first table in each section shows where you should be **right now** (Week 7) to stay on track. The second table shows where you need to be by **Week 14**. 
> 
> * **Action Required:** Keep the table pair(s) that match your current performance or future goals, and delete the rest. Feel free to mix and match (e.g., if you are currently performing at a B level but aiming for an A by the end of the semester). Please provide an honest assessment!

## Grading Tiers

### A Tier: Leader

**Where I am right now (Week 7):**

|        | Grade | Tasks Completed | Stretches | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculations @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goals Letter (Mid) |
|:-------|:-----:|:---------------:|:---------:|:------------------:|:----------------------------:|:----------------:|:-------------------------:|
| Leader |   A   |        7-9        |   >= 1    |        >= 1        |               3              |       N/A        |             1             |

**Where I need to be by Week 14:**

|        | Grade | Tasks (18 Total) | Stretch Tasks (5) | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculation Quizzes @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goal Letter (End) |
|:-------|:-----:|:----------------:|:-----------------:|:------------------:|:------------------------------------:|:----------------:|:------------------------:|
| Leader |   A   |      17–18       |       >= 3        | >= 3 (incl. Cert)  |                  6                   |       >= 3       |            1             |

---

### B Tier: Supporter

**Where I am right now (Week 7):**

|           | Grade | Tasks Completed | Stretches | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculations @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goals Letter (Mid) |
|:----------|:-----:|:---------------:|:---------:|:------------------:|:----------------------------:|:----------------:|:-------------------------:|
| Supporter |   B   |       5-7       |   >= 1    |        >= 1        |             2–3              |       N/A        |             1             |

**Where I need to be by Week 14:**

|           | Grade | Tasks (18 Total) | Stretch Tasks (5) | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculation Quizzes @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goal Letter (End) |
|:----------|:-----:|:----------------:|:-----------------:|:------------------:|:------------------------------------:|:----------------:|:------------------------:|
| Supporter |   B   |      15–16       |       >= 2        | >= 2 (incl. Cert)  |                  5                   |       >= 3       |            1             |

---

### C Tier: Listener

**Where I am right now (Week 7):**

|          | Grade | Tasks Completed | Stretches | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculations @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goals Letter (Mid) |
|:---------|:-----:|:---------------:|:---------:|:------------------:|:----------------------------:|:----------------:|:-------------------------:|
| Listener |   C   |       3-4       |   >= 1    |        >= 1        |             1–2              |       N/A        |             1             |

**Where I need to be by Week 14:**

|          | Grade | Tasks (18 Total) | Stretch Tasks (5) | DS Community Tasks | Methods & Calculation Quizzes @ 100% | Coding Challenge | Course Goal Letter (End) |
|:---------|:-----:|:----------------:|:-----------------:|:------------------:|:------------------------------------:|:----------------:|:------------------------:|
| Listener |   C   |      13–14       |       >= 1        |        >= 1        |                  3                   |       >= 2       |            1             |

---

## My Letter

### Reflection & Progress Report
* **Original Goal:** [State the grade you aimed for at the beginning of the semester]
* **Current Status:** [Briefly describe your overall progress toward achieving this goal]

### Current Standings 
*(Please verify these numbers against your current gradebook status)*
* **Tasks Completed:** [Number]
* **Stretch Tasks Completed:** [Number]
* **Methods & Calculations Quizzes (at 100%):** [Number]

### Community & Activity Description
[Provide a brief explanation of the specific data science community activities you have participated in or completed so far.]

### Looking Forward (Action Plan)
[Use this space to gauge what you need to do to finish strong over the next 7 weeks. If you are currently off-track from your original goal, explain why and detail your plan to catch up—or describe your revised target grade and approach.]
